title: Linked Lists, Nodes, and Pointer Invariants · Trace Retrieval
summary: Build a mutable work queue where stable node links matter more than random access. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a linked structure with diagrammed invariants after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace singly and doubly linked node references without losing head, tail, or reachability.
Insert and delete at boundaries while preserving connectivity and size invariants.
Implement traversal with termination evidence and malformed-cycle protection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
